panels.description:
Becoming a dead letter means that the maximum number of re-delivery times per minute reaches the number of messages that are no longer delivered. 
Messages that are no longer delivered will be saved to the specified Topic or discarded according to the settings.

targets.legendFormat: Amount of messages transferred to dead messages (messages/minute)
